# Real HWP Fixtures

These five HWP 5.0 documents are Korean government publications sourced from the
Ministry of Employment and Labour (고용노동부) open-data portal.

| File | Title |
|------|-------|
| moel_01_goyang_center.hwp | 고용센터 및 고용관련 부서 운영 규정 |
| moel_02_vocational_training.hwp | 직업훈련 관련 훈령 |
| moel_03_livelihood_loan.hwp | 생계비 대부 관련 훈령 |
| moel_04_instructor_education.hwp | 강사 교육 관련 훈령 |
| moel_05_quality_management.hwp | 품질 관리 관련 훈령 |

**License**: 공공누리 제1유형 (Korea Open Government License Type 1 — free use with attribution).

The paired `.md` files are machine-generated golden outputs produced by hwp2md
and are updated whenever the conversion pipeline changes in a way that affects
output correctness.
